title: Auto-merge health probe always fails — CLI-shape mismatch with step_executor.sh

steps.description: Replace step_executor.sh invocation in maybe_run_probe with a direct subprocess call to the resolved opencode/claude binary; preserve event_metadata shape, timeout cap, and skip guards
Review S01: argv correctness, event-metadata shape, scope adherence (no executor change), TDD RED evidence
Rewrite unit tests to assert on argv shape; add tests/integration/test_auto_merge_health_runtime.py with a fake CLI on PATH for end-to-end shape verification
Review S03: semantic-strength check, RED reasoning, every mocked-subprocess test asserts on argv, isolation under pytest-randomly
Cross-step global review: AC traceability (AC1/AC2/AC3), cross-file argv consistency between backend and tests, scope adherence
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill
